leftObject.title: Left Object API Name
leftObject.description: API name of the first object to analyze (e.g., Pricebook2)

leftPermissions.title: Left Permissions
leftPermissions.description: Comma-separated: Create,Edit,Delete,ModifyAll. Defaults to all four.

rightObject.title: Right Object API Name
rightObject.description: API name of the second object to analyze (e.g., Account)

rightPermissions.title: Right Permissions
rightPermissions.description: Comma-separated: Create,Edit,Delete,ModifyAll. Defaults to all four.
